ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchange ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the exchange */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used to make the prediction */,
  "open_error" REAL /* Error in open price prediction */,
  "open_error_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of error in open price prediction */,
  "pred_change" REAL /* Predicted change in stock price */,
  "real_change" REAL /* Real change in stock price */,
  "change_error" REAL /* Error in change prediction */,
  "change_error_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of error in change prediction */,
  "correct" INTEGER /* Whether the prediction was correct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions_upload" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used to make the prediction */,
  "open_error" REAL /* Error in open price prediction */,
  "open_error_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of error in open price prediction */,
  "pred_change" REAL /* Predicted change in stock price */,
  "real_change" REAL /* Real change in stock price */,
  "change_error" REAL /* Error in change prediction */,
  "change_error_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of error in change prediction */,
  "correct" INTEGER /* Whether the prediction was correct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_upload_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_upload_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_upload_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_upload" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the upload */,
  "model_data" TEXT /* Data of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_upload_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first user */,
  "user_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second user */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the collaboration */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("user_id1") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("user_id2") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "trigger_type" TEXT /* Type of the trigger (e.g., price, volume) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_session" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the session */,
  "session_data" TEXT /* Data of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of the trend (e.g., upward, downward) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_trends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_volatility" (
  "volatility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volatility record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the volatility record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volatility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_volatility_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the dividend record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each split record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the split record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
